prometheus.gateway:
# HELP sdkwork_service_info Static service identity metric
# TYPE sdkwork_service_info gauge
sdkwork_service_info{service="gateway"} 1
# HELP sdkwork_http_requests_total Total HTTP requests observed
# TYPE sdkwork_http_requests_total counter
sdkwork_http_requests_total{service="gateway",method="GET",route="/health",status="200"} 1
# HELP sdkwork_http_request_duration_ms_sum Cumulative request duration in milliseconds
# TYPE sdkwork_http_request_duration_ms_sum counter
sdkwork_http_request_duration_ms_sum{service="gateway",method="GET",route="/health",status="200"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_http_request_duration_ms_count Request count paired with duration summaries
# TYPE sdkwork_http_request_duration_ms_count counter
sdkwork_http_request_duration_ms_count{service="gateway",method="GET",route="/health",status="200"} 1
# HELP sdkwork_upstream_requests_total Total upstream execution outcomes observed
# TYPE sdkwork_upstream_requests_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_upstream_retries_total Total upstream retry control decisions observed
# TYPE sdkwork_upstream_retries_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_upstream_retry_reasons_total Total upstream retry reasons observed
# TYPE sdkwork_upstream_retry_reasons_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_upstream_retry_delay_ms_total Cumulative upstream retry delay in milliseconds
# TYPE sdkwork_upstream_retry_delay_ms_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_gateway_failovers_total Total gateway failover outcomes observed
# TYPE sdkwork_gateway_failovers_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_provider_health_status Latest observed provider health state where 1 is healthy and 0 is unhealthy
# TYPE sdkwork_provider_health_status gauge
# HELP sdkwork_provider_health_observed_at_ms Latest observed provider health timestamp in unix milliseconds
# TYPE sdkwork_provider_health_observed_at_ms gauge
# HELP sdkwork_provider_health_persist_failures_total Total provider health snapshot persistence failures observed
# TYPE sdkwork_provider_health_persist_failures_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_provider_health_recovery_probes_total Total provider health recovery probe outcomes observed
# TYPE sdkwork_provider_health_recovery_probes_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_gateway_execution_context_failures_total Total gateway-local execution context failures observed
# TYPE sdkwork_gateway_execution_context_failures_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_attempts_total Total commerce reconciliation outcomes observed
# TYPE sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_attempts_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_processed_orders_total Total commerce orders reconciled into canonical accounts
# TYPE sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_processed_orders_total counter
sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_processed_orders_total{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_backlog_orders Latest observed unreconciled commerce order backlog
# TYPE sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_backlog_orders gauge
sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_backlog_orders{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_checkpoint_lag_ms Latest observed lag between checkpoint and newest commerce order progress
# TYPE sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_checkpoint_lag_ms gauge
sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_checkpoint_lag_ms{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_last_success_at_ms Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the latest successful commerce reconciliation run
# TYPE sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_last_success_at_ms gauge
sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_last_success_at_ms{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_last_failure_at_ms Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the latest failed commerce reconciliation run
# TYPE sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_last_failure_at_ms gauge
sdkwork_commerce_reconciliation_last_failure_at_ms{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_marketing_recovery_attempts_total Total marketing recovery job outcomes observed
# TYPE sdkwork_marketing_recovery_attempts_total counter
# HELP sdkwork_marketing_recovery_scanned_reservations_total Total reservations scanned by marketing recovery jobs
# TYPE sdkwork_marketing_recovery_scanned_reservations_total counter
sdkwork_marketing_recovery_scanned_reservations_total{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_marketing_expired_reservations_total Total stale coupon reservations expired by recovery jobs
# TYPE sdkwork_marketing_expired_reservations_total counter
sdkwork_marketing_expired_reservations_total{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_marketing_released_codes_total Total coupon codes released by recovery jobs
# TYPE sdkwork_marketing_released_codes_total counter
sdkwork_marketing_released_codes_total{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_marketing_released_budget_minor_total Total marketing budget minor units released by recovery jobs
# TYPE sdkwork_marketing_released_budget_minor_total counter
sdkwork_marketing_released_budget_minor_total{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_marketing_recovery_outbox_events_total Total marketing recovery outbox events emitted
# TYPE sdkwork_marketing_recovery_outbox_events_total counter
sdkwork_marketing_recovery_outbox_events_total{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_marketing_recovery_last_success_at_ms Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the latest successful marketing recovery run
# TYPE sdkwork_marketing_recovery_last_success_at_ms gauge
sdkwork_marketing_recovery_last_success_at_ms{service="gateway"} 0
# HELP sdkwork_marketing_recovery_last_failure_at_ms Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the latest failed marketing recovery run
# TYPE sdkwork_marketing_recovery_last_failure_at_ms gauge
sdkwork_marketing_recovery_last_failure_at_ms{service="gateway"} 0
